title: Random Player Size
description: Randomizes every player's height for more variation
body:
Do you think players need more variation? Well this datapack might fix that for you.

## What does this do?
Upon loging into a world with this datapack, your size will vary from 0.85 to 1.15 times the normal height. Except with the use of commands, you are stuck with this height forever.

## How to use
Enter **/function rps:config**

You can now change the minimum and maximum size a player can have. You can also re-roll somebody's size by typing in their name.
